contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: [4/13/26, 12:58:06 PM] Gary Teh: OpenClaw × Cursor — daily state of the DAO (not a manual post from Gary)
  
  •⁠  ⁠Hit List now records whether a Google listing is open or permanently closed, so outreach and filters stop treating dead storefronts as live leads.
  •⁠  ⁠The nearby-stores map shows real opening hours and keeps "Open now" in sync when you expand the map, so volunteers make fewer wrong-time visits.
  •⁠  ⁠Details and links in the next message.
  [4/13/26, 12:58:47 PM] Gary Teh: Shipped
  
  •⁠  ⁠go_to_market PR #45 (Hit List Google listing + Places backfill + GAS sync): https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/45
  •⁠  ⁠dapp PR #152 (stores nearby hours, expanded Open now, permanently closed styling): https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/152
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 200.00
- Attached Filename: None (proof: links in description)
- Destination Contribution File Location: See description (URL(s))
